Rising also reports institutional support from the Philadelphia Department of Health (COVID-19 Mobile Vaccination Program). Michael Gottlieb reports institutional support from the Society for Academic Emergency Medicine Foundation Emerging Infectious Disease and Preparedness Grant. Melanie F. Molina reports grant support from Harold Amos Medical Faculty Development Program, Robert Wood Johnson Foundation, and the National Institute on Drug Abuse, NIH, and service as the Development Officer for the Academy for Diversity and Inclusion in Emergency Medicine, Executive Committee. Efrat Kean reports institutional support from Nanobiosym Research Institute, MeMed, the Society for Academic Emergency Medicine Foundation, the Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality, and NIH, and receipt of an honorarium for an emergency medicine conference talk at the Philadelphia College of Osteopathic Medicine Conference. No other potential conflicts of interest were disclosed.
